ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic data entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the data was collected */,
  "diversity_index" REAL /* Diversity index for the location */,
  "black_african_american_percent" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is Black or African American */,
  "american_indian_alaska_native_percent" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is American Indian and Alaska Native */,
  "asian_percent" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is Asian */,
  "native_hawaiian_pacific_islander_percent" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is Native Hawaiian and Other Pacific Islander */,
  "two_or_more_races_percent" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is Two or More Races */,
  "hispanic_latino_percent" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is Hispanic or Latino */,
  "white_non_hispanic_percent" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is White alone, not Hispanic or Latino */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the data was collected */,
  "population_total" INTEGER /* Total population of the location */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "gender_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of males to females */,
  "income_median" REAL /* Median household income */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Average education level (e.g., high school, college) */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate of the population */,
  "housing_density" REAL /* Average number of people per household */,
  "healthcare_access" REAL /* Percentage of the population with access to healthcare */,
  "language_spoken" TEXT /* Primary language spoken in the location */,
  "migration_rate" REAL /* Net migration rate */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source (to link to the data_sources table) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_ethnicity" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race/ethnicity category */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race/ethnicity category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the race/ethnicity category */,
  "language_spoken" TEXT /* Primary language spoken by the race/ethnicity group */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the race/ethnicity group */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the race/ethnicity group */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Average education level of the race/ethnicity group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the demographic category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the demographic category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data entry the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON, XLSX) */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file for integrity verification */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data in the file (e.g., raw, processed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data entry the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the readme file (e.g., text, Markdown) */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file for integrity verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration_seconds" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data entry */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the version */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the version was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "source_reference" TEXT /* Reference to the specific data within the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_links_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_links_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data entry */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "metadata_type" TEXT /* Type of metadata (e.g., technical, descriptive) */,
  "metadata_source" TEXT /* Source of the metadata (e.g., manual input, automated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id")
)
